# Bug Report

## Issue description

Please write a description about what happened when the issue occurred. Screenshots or screen recordings are welcome to support your description.

## Steps to Reproduce

1.
2.
3.

## Expected Behaviour

What should have happened?

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened?

## Reproducibility

- [ ] Happens consistently
- [ ] Happens sometimes
- [ ] Happened once

## Attach log files here

⚠️ **If a issue does not include log files it will be closed after a week if it is not amended.** ⚠️

Please ensure to visit your cadmium folder and attach **all** the files contained in the **logs** folder as they are crucial for developers to reproduce your problem and diagnose the issue, please keep in mind to **check** the log folders for any potential sensitive information you do not wish to be available on the internet. 

(In the case you do not see any files contained in the logs folder please check your `configuration.json` file and ensure logging is enabled)

## Checklist

Please ensure to carry out the following and tick the boxes once done

- [ ] I am using the latest version of Cadmium
- [ ] I searched existing issues before creating this issue
- [ ] I attached the requested log files
- [ ] I removed any sensitive information from attached files.

## What's next?

Once you submit the issue a developer will review it's contents and ensure it's legitimacy, please make sure to follow this issue and respond to further questions if needed.
